scope: Praxis Learning $100/mo product loop final UltraQA gate

bugsFound.title: Real Hermes/OpenClaw status could become available when env command and allow flag were set even though runner execution is not implemented.
bugsFound.impact: UI/API could imply real runtime can learn while run path still blocks or, later, invite unsafe external execution assumptions.
bugsFound.fix: Real external agents now stay available:false/runtimeAvailable:false until REAL_PRAXIS_RUNTIME_RUNNER exists; configured commands produce explicit not implemented/approved blocker.

bugsFound.title: CLI accepted non-finite numeric input and failed later with min score NaN.
bugsFound.impact: Misleading operator error during nightly learning run.
bugsFound.fix: CLI now validates --limit and --min-score up front and returns structured JSON error.

fixesApplied: src/lib/praxis-learning.ts: real runtime availability hard-blocked until approved runner implementation exists.
scripts/run-praxis-learning-loop.ts: finite numeric CLI validation added.
scripts/check-praxis-quality-gate.ts: regression covers configured-but-unimplemented Hermes runtime staying blocked.

scenarioMatrix.scenario: Static security grep for secrets, x_search, external calls, destructive commands
scenarioMatrix.evidence: No secrets; no x_search calls; no fetch/spawn/exec/rm in Praxis loop runtime. Env var names only.

scenarioMatrix.scenario: Configured real Hermes env with allow flag
scenarioMatrix.evidence: Hermes remains available:false/runtimeAvailable:false; blocker says runtime execution not implemented/approved; no command executed.
Exit 1 with JSON error: Invalid agent bad.
Exit 1 with JSON error: --min-score must be finite number.

scenarioMatrix.scenario: Artifact integrity: sourceUrls, skill draft paths, real runtime blocked reports
scenarioMatrix.evidence: 5 safe relative skill draft paths; 84 reports checked; completed/blocked reports all have sourceUrls; real hermes/openclaw reports all blocked.

scenarioMatrix.scenario: HTTP API smoke on running localhost:3000
scenarioMatrix.evidence: /status 200; /morning-report 401 without auth; /reports 401 without auth; real agents unavailable.
/dashboard 200 and contains Praxis learning panel, mock Hermes, latest batch learned.
test:praxis-learning, test:praxis-quality-gate, test:praxis-learning-loop, test:hermes-acp, test:school-acp, lint, build all passed.

commandsRun.note: Turbopack NFT trace warning from next.config.ts -> /api/hermes/judgement; unrelated pre-existing build warning.

remainingRealRuntimeBlockers.hermes: Real Hermes runner intentionally blocked until a repo-approved REAL_PRAXIS_RUNTIME_RUNNER implementation exists; HERMES_LEARNER_COMMAND alone is not enough.
remainingRealRuntimeBlockers.openclaw: Real OpenClaw runner intentionally blocked until a repo-approved REAL_PRAXIS_RUNTIME_RUNNER implementation exists; OPENCLAW_LEARNER_COMMAND alone is not enough.

residualRisks: Build emits unrelated Turbopack NFT trace warning involving next.config.ts and /api/hermes/judgement; build still exits 0.
Direct route import smoke with raw node is blocked by Next ESM package resolution; HTTP smoke through live Next server passed instead.
No real Hermes/OpenClaw execution adapter exists yet by design; mock loop proves product flow safely.
